mapper.select: /** CmmtAuthorityRoleDao.selectList */ select authority_id ,role_id ,creator_id ,created_dt from cmmt_authority_role where authority_id = #{authorityId}
/** CmmtAuthorityRoleDao.selectByRoleId */ select authority_id ,role_id ,creator_id ,created_dt from cmmt_authority_role where role_id = #{roleId}
